title: cherleria dichotoma
intro: Cherleria dichotoma, also known as Lomatium cous, is a flowering plant native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It is a member of the carrot family and is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing cold and flu symptoms, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Cherleria dichotoma can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and tinctures, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy for various health issues.
